textEn: There's nothing to tell. It's just some guy I work with.
textZh: 没什么好说的 他只不过是我的同事

textEn: Come on. You're going out with a guy.
textZh: 少来了 和你交往的男人…

textEn: There's gotta be something wrong with him.
textZh: 多多少少一定有点问题

textEn: So does he have a hump and a hair piece?
textZh: 他既驼背又戴假发？

textEn: Wait. Does he eat chalk?
textZh: 等一下 他是不是会吃粉笔？

textEn: I don't want her to go through what I went through with Carl. Oh.
textZh: 我只是不希望你重蹈我和卡尔的覆辙

textEn: Okay, everybody relax. This is not even a date.
textZh: 各位放轻松 这不算约会

textEn: It's just two people going out to dinner and not having sex.
textZh: 不过是两个人一起出去吃晚餐 而且不上床

textEn: Sounds like a date to me.
textZh: 对我来说这就是约会

textEn: I'm back in high school, in the middle of the cafeteria...
textZh: 做了个梦 在中学时代 我站在餐厅中央…

textEn: ...and I realize I'm totally naked.
textZh: 突然发现自己全身赤裸

textEn: - Oh, yeah.     - I've had that dream.
textZh: - 对 没错   - 我做过那样的梦

textEn: Then I look down and I realize there is a phone...
textZh: 我低头一看 看见有一个电话…

textEn: ...there.
textZh: 在那里

textEn: - Instead of...     - That's right!
textZh: - 而不是…   - 没错

textEn: - That one, I've never had.     - No.
textZh: - 我没做过那样的梦   - 没有

textEn: All of a sudden, the phone starts to ring.
textZh: 突然 那个电话响了

textEn: And it turns out it's my mother.
textZh: 结果是我妈妈打来的

textEn: Which is very, very weird because she never calls me.
textZh: 这非常奇怪 因为她从来都不会打电话给我

textEn: Hi.
textZh: 嗨

textEn: This guy says "hello," I wanna kill myself.
textZh: 这家伙说"嗨"的时候 我却想杀了我自己

textEn: Are you okay, sweetie?
textZh: 你还好吧 亲爱的？

textEn: I feel like someone reached my throat,
textZh: 我就感觉好像某人伸手进我的喉咙

textEn: grabbed my small intestine, pulled it out of my mouth...
textZh: 抓住我的小肠 从我的嘴里拉出来

textEn: - ...and tied it around my neck.     - Cookie?
textZh: - 再在我的脖子上打结…   - 要吃饼干吗？

textEn: Carol moved her stuff out today.
textZh: 卡萝今天搬走了她的东西

textEn: - Let me get you some coffee.     - Thanks.
textZh: - 我给你拿杯咖啡   - 谢谢

textEn: No. No, don't! Stop cleansing my aura.
textZh: 不 不要  不要清理我的光环

textEn: Just leave my aura alone, okay?
textZh: 不要管我的光环 好吗？

textEn: I'll be fine. All right? Really. I hope she'll be very happy.
textZh: 我会没事的 好吗？真的 我希望她开心

textEn: - No, you don't.     - No, I don't.
textZh: - 不 你并不希望   - 是的 我不希望

textEn: To hell with her. She left me!
textZh: 叫她去死 是她离开了我

textEn: And you never knew she was a lesbian.
textZh: 你从来都不知道她是女同性恋

textEn: No! Okay?
textZh: 不知道 行了吧

textEn: Why does everyone keep fixating on that?
textZh: 为什么每个人老是要提出来？

textEn: She didn't know. How should I know?
textZh: 她都不知道 我又怎么会知道？

textEn: Sometimes I wish I was a lesbian.
textZh: 有时候我希望我是女同性恋…

textEn: Did I say that out loud?
textZh: 我讲得很大声吗？

textEn: All right, Ross. Look, you're feeling a lot of pain right now.
textZh: 没事的 罗斯 你现在感到很痛苦

textEn: You're angry. You're hurting.
textZh: 你很生气 很伤心

textEn: Can I tell you what the answer is?
textZh: 我能告诉你解决方法是什么吗？

textEn: Strip joints!
textZh: 脱衣舞厅

textEn: Come on, you're single. Have some hormones.
textZh: 别这样 你单身了 有需求的

textEn: See, but I don't want to be single, okay?
textZh: 我不想单身 好吗？

textEn: I just wanna be married again.
textZh: 我只想…再次结婚

textEn: And I just want a million dollars!
textZh: 而我只想要一百万美金

textEn: Rachel?
textZh: 瑞秋

textEn: Oh, God, Monica! Hi! Thank God!
textZh: 噢 老天爷 摩妮卡 感谢上帝

textEn: I went to your building and this guy with a hammer said...
textZh: 我刚到你那里去 而你不在 那个拿着大锤子的家伙说...

textEn: ...that you might be here, and you are.
textZh: 你可能在这里 你真在这里

textEn: - Can I get you some coffee?     - Decaf.
textZh: - 你想喝点咖啡吗？- 无咖啡因的

textEn: Okay, everybody, this is Rachel, another Lincoln High survivor.
textZh: 好了 各位 这位是瑞秋 另一个林肯高中的幸存者

textEn: This is everybody. This is Chandler and Phoebe...
textZh: 这就是各位 这是钱德  菲比

textEn: ...and Joey. And remember my brother, Ross?
textZh: 乔伊  还有 你还记得我哥哥罗斯吗？

textEn: - Sure!     - Hey.
textZh: - 当然  - 嘿

textEn: - Hi.     - Oh, God.
textZh: - 嗨   - 天啊

textEn: So you wanna tell us now,
textZh: 那你现在可以告诉我们了吗？

textEn: or are we waiting for four wet bridesmaids?
textZh: 还是说我们在等着四位湿漉的伴娘？

textEn: Oh, God! Well, it started about a half-hour before the wedding.
textZh: 好吧 大概在婚礼前半个小时

textEn: I was in this room with all the presents...
textZh: 我在礼物间里

textEn: ...and I was looking at this gravy boat.
textZh: 看着那个肉汁壶

textEn: This really gorgeous Limoges gravy boat.
textZh: 那是个非常好看的肉汁壶

textEn: When all of a sudden... Sweet 'N Low?
textZh: 然后 突然…有代糖吗？

textEn: I realized...
textZh: 我发现…

textEn: ...I was more turned on by this gravy boat than by Barry.
textZh: 我对这个肉汁壶 比对巴瑞更有冲动

textEn: Then I got really freaked out, and that's when it hit me:
textZh: 然后我吓呆了 然后这个想法突然出现在脑中:

textEn: How much Barry looks like Mr. Potato Head.
textZh: 巴瑞看起来多像洋芋头先生啊

textEn: You know, I mean, I always knew he looked familiar, but...
textZh: 我总是觉得他眼熟 但是…

textEn: Anyway, I just had to get out of there, and I started wondering:
textZh: 总之 我必须离开那里 我在想:

textEn: "Why am I doing this?" And "Who am I doing this for?"
textZh: "我为什么这样做？我为谁这样做？"

textEn: Anyway, I just didn't know where to go, and I know you and I have drifted apart...
textZh: 我不知道该去哪里 而且我知道我和你有点疏远了

textEn: ...but you're the only person I know in the city.
textZh: 但你是我这个城市里唯一认识的人

textEn: Who wasn't invited to the wedding.
textZh: 而且没有受邀参加你的婚礼

textEn: Oh, I was kind of hoping that wouldn't be an issue.
textZh: 噢 我希望你不会把它当一回事…

textEn: I'm guessing he bought her the big pipe organ...
textZh: 我猜他给她买了个管风琴

textEn: ...and she's really not happy about it.
textZh: 而她很不喜欢那个

textEn: Daddy, I just... I can't marry him.
textZh: 老爸 我就是无法和他结婚

textEn: I'm sorry.
textZh: 对不起

textEn: I just don't love him.
textZh: 我只是不爱他了

textEn: Well, it matters to me.
textZh: 这对我很有关系

textEn: She should not be wearing those pants.
textZh: 她真不应该穿那条裤子

textEn: I say push her down the stairs.
textZh: 我觉得应该把她推下楼

textEn: Push her down the stairs! Push her down the stairs!
textZh: 把她推下楼…

textEn: Come on, Daddy, listen to me!
textZh: 爸爸 听我说

textEn: It's like all of my life, everyone's always told me, "You're a shoe!
textZh: 这就好像在我一生中 所有人都告诉我: "你是鞋子 "

textEn: You're a shoe! You're a shoe! You're a shoe!"
textZh: "你是鞋子…"

textEn: Then today I stopped and said, "What if I don't wanna be a shoe?
textZh: 然后今天 我停下来对自己说: "如果我不想成为鞋子呢？

textEn: What if I wanna be a purse? You know?
textZh: 如果我想成为一个包包？

textEn: Or a hat?"
textZh: 或一顶帽子？"

textEn: I don't want you to buy me a hat, I am a hat.
textZh: 不 我不是要你给我买帽子 我是说我是帽子

textEn: It's a metaphor, Daddy!
textZh: 这是个比喻 爸爸

textEn: You can see where he'd have trouble.
textZh: 你看得出他哪里听不懂

textEn: Look, Daddy, it's my life.
textZh: 爸爸 这是我的生活

textEn: Well, maybe I'll just stay here with Monica.
textZh: 也许我可以和摩妮卡住在一起

textEn: I guess we've established she's staying with Monica.
textZh: 我猜我们已经确定 她要和摩妮卡住在一起了

textEn: Well, maybe that's my decision.
textZh: 也许那是我的决定

textEn: Well, maybe I don't need your money.
textZh: 也许我不需要你的钱

textEn: Wait! Wait! I said maybe!
textZh: 等等 我说也许

textEn: Okay. Just breathe, that's it.
textZh: 呼吸 呼吸 好 就这样

textEn: Just try to think of nice, calm things.
textZh: 试着想一些让你镇定的事…

textEn: Raindrops on roses And whiskers on kittens
textZh: 玫瑰上的雨滴 还有猫的胡须

textEn: Doorbells and sleigh bells And something with mittens
textZh: 门铃和雪橇铃 还有手套

textEn: La la la something With string
textZh: 啦啦啦 还有一些条状物

textEn: I'm all better now.
textZh: 我现在好多了

textEn: I helped.
textZh: 我帮上忙啦

textEn: Look, this is probably for the best, you know?
textZh: 瞧 这也许对你来讲是最好的 知道吗？

textEn: Independence. Taking control of your life.
textZh: 独立了 把握自己的生活

textEn: And, hey, if you need anything, you can always come to Joey.
textZh: 还有 你还需要什么 你可以随时来找乔伊

textEn: Me and Chandler live right across the hall. And he's away a lot.
textZh: 我和钱德就住在对面 而且他经常不在

textEn: Joey, stop hitting on her. It's her wedding day.
textZh: 乔伊 不要再对她放电了 今天是她结婚的日子

textEn: What? Like there's a rule or something?
textZh: 怎么啦 难道这还有什么规定吗？

textEn: Please don't do that again. It's a horrible sound.
textZh: 请不要再按了 那是很恐怖的声音

textEn: - Uh, it's Paul.     - Buzz him in.
textZh: - 我是保罗   - 让他进来

textEn: - Who's Paul?     - Paul, the wine guy, Paul?
textZh: - 谁是保罗？- 保罗 红酒达人 保罗？

textEn: Maybe.
textZh: 也许

textEn: Wait a minute. Your "not a real date" is with Paul, the wine guy?
textZh: 等等 你今晚的"不是真正约会" 是和红酒达人保罗？

textEn: - He finally asked you out?     - Yes.
textZh: - 他终于约你出去啦？- 是的

textEn: Ooh. This is a "Dear Diary" moment.
textZh: 真是个可以写入日记的时刻

textEn: Rach, wait, I can cancel.
textZh: 瑞秋 等等 我可以取消

textEn: Please, no. Go, I'll be fine.
textZh: 不用 你去吧 我不会有事的

textEn: Ross, are you okay? I mean, do you want me to stay?
textZh: 罗斯 你没事吧？你希望我留下来吗？

textEn: That'd be good.
textZh: 能留下就太好了

textEn: - Really?     - No, go on! It's Paul, the wine guy.
textZh: - 真的？- 不 去吧 那可是红酒达人保罗耶

textEn: Hi, come in. Paul, this is...
textZh: 进来 保罗 这是…

textEn: ...everybody. Everybody, this is Paul.
textZh: 大家 各位 这是保罗

textEn: Paul, the wine guy.
textZh: 保罗 红酒达人

textEn: - Wine guy.     - I didn't catch your name. Paul, was it?
textZh: - 红酒达人    - 我没听清楚你的名字 是保罗吗？

textEn: - Okay. Sit down. Two seconds.     - Okay.
textZh: - 请坐 两秒钟就好   - 好

textEn: Ooh, I just pulled out four eyelashes. That can't be good.
textZh: 我刚拔掉四根睫毛 不是个好兆头

textEn: So, Rachel, what are you up to tonight?
textZh: 那么瑞秋 你今晚打算做什么？

textEn: Well, I was supposed to be headed for Aruba on my honeymoon...
textZh: 我本来应该到阿鲁巴度蜜月

textEn: ...so, nothing.
textZh: 所以 没事做

textEn: Right. You're not even getting your honeymoon.
textZh: 对呀 你连蜜月都无法去

textEn: God. No, no. Although, Aruba. Heh. This time of year? Eh.
textZh: 不过 阿鲁巴 这个时候？

textEn: Talk about your...
textZh: 你可以谈论一下…

textEn: ...big lizards.
textZh: 大蜥蜴

textEn: Anyway, if you don't feel like being alone tonight...
textZh: 总之 如果今晚你不想自己一个人的话

textEn: ...Joey and Chandler are helping me with my furniture.
textZh: 乔伊和钱德要过来 帮我组装我的新家具

textEn: Yes, and we're very excited about it.
textZh: 对 而且我们为此感到兴奋

textEn: Actually, thanks, but I'm just gonna hang out here tonight.
textZh: 谢谢了 不过我想今晚还是留在这里吧

textEn: - It's been a long day.     - Oh, sure. Okay. Sure.
textZh: - 今天真是漫长的一天   - 是呀 好吧

textEn: Hey, Pheebs, you wanna help?
textZh: 菲比 你要来帮忙吗？

textEn: Oh, I wish I could, but I don't want to.
textZh: 噢 我希望我能 但是我不想

textEn: I'm supposed to attach a bracket-y thing to the side things...
textZh: 我应该把支架固定在侧面

textEn: ...using a bunch of these little worm guys.
textZh: 用螺纹涡轮

textEn: I have no bracket-y thing, I see no worm guys whatsoever...
textZh: 我没有支架 没有看到螺纹涡轮

textEn: ...and I cannot feel my legs.
textZh: 而且我的腿麻了

textEn: What's this?
textZh: 这是什么？

textEn: I have no idea.
textZh: 我不知道

textEn: - Done with the bookcase.     - All finished.
textZh: - 搞定书架了    - 完工了

textEn: This was Carol's favorite beer.
textZh: 这是卡萝最喜欢的啤酒

textEn: She always drank it out of the can. I should have known.
textZh: 她总是直接从罐子喝 我该知道的

textEn: Hey. Ross, let me ask you a question.
textZh: 罗斯 我来问你一个问题

textEn: She got the furniture, the stereo, the good TV.
textZh: 她得到家具、音响、超赞的电视

textEn: What did you get?
textZh: 那你得到了什么？

textEn: You guys.
textZh: 你们啊

textEn: - Oh, God. Oh, my God.     - You got screwed.
textZh: - 天呀   - 你被耍了

textEn: - Oh, my God.     - I know, I know. I'm such an idiot.
textZh: - 我的老天    - 我知道 我真是个笨蛋

textEn: I should've caught on when she went to the dentist four and five times a week.
textZh: 当她一个礼拜见四、五次牙医 我就该知道了

textEn: I mean, how clean can teeth get?
textZh: 谁的牙齿需要这么干净？

textEn: My brother's going through that. He's such a mess.
textZh: 我哥哥正在克服这种事呢 他真是一团糟

textEn: How did you get through it?
textZh: 你是怎么克服的？

textEn: He might try accidentally breaking something valuable of hers.
textZh: 他可以试着砸烂她的一些贵重的东西

textEn: - Say her...     - Leg?
textZh: - 比如她的…   - 腿？

textEn: Heh. That's one way of going through it, yeah.
textZh: 那样也可以

textEn: Me, I went for the watch.
textZh: 我则是砸了她的手表

textEn: - You actually broke her watch?     - Mm.
textZh: - 真的砸了她的手表？ - 嗯

textEn: Barry, I'm sorry. I am so sorry.
textZh: 巴瑞 对不起 对不起

textEn: I know you probably think it's about what I said
textZh: 我知道你可能认为和那天我对你说

textEn: that you making love with your socks on, but it isn't.
textZh: 跟你穿袜子做爱有关 但不是的

textEn: It isn't, it's about me. And I...
textZh: 这和我有关 我只是…

textEn: Hi. Machine cut me off again. Anyway...
textZh: 嘿 机器又把电话挂断了 不管怎样…

textEn: You know what's scary?
textZh: 知道什么最吓人的吗？

textEn: What if there's only one woman for everybody?
textZh: 如果每个人只有一个女人适合他呢？

textEn: I mean, what if you get one woman, and that's it?
textZh: 我是说 如果你得到一个女人 就这样

textEn: Unfortunately, in my case, there was only one woman for her.
textZh: 不幸的是 以我的例子来讲 是她…得到一个女人

textEn: What are you talking about? One woman.
textZh: 你在说什么？"一个女人"？

textEn: That's like saying there's only one flavor of ice cream for you.
textZh: 那就好像你只吃一种口味的冰淇淋

textEn: Let me tell you something, Ross. There's lots of flavors out there.
textZh: 让我告诉你 罗斯 还有很多种口味

textEn: There's rocky road and cookie dough and bing cherry vanilla.
textZh: 有碎糖口味、饼干口味 然后还有香草口味

textEn: You can get them with jimmies or nuts or whipped cream.
textZh: 还可以加糖条、果仁 或者鲜奶油一起吃

textEn: This is the best thing that ever happened to you.
textZh: 这是你一生中最棒的时刻了

textEn: You got married. You were like, what, 8?
textZh: 你难道是八岁结婚的？

textEn: Welcome back to the world. Grab a spoon.
textZh: 欢迎回到现实里 拿起汤匙

textEn: I honestly don't know if I'm hungry or horny.
textZh: 我真不知道我是饿了 还是饥渴

textEn: Then stay out of my freezer.
textZh: 离我的冰箱远点

textEn: Ever since she walked out on me, I...
textZh: 从她离开我之后 我…

textEn: What? What?
textZh: 怎么啦？

textEn: You wanna spell it out with noodles?
textZh: 你想边吃面条边讲出来？

textEn: No, it's more of a fifth date kind of revelation.
textZh: 不 这本该在和你第五次约会时才能说出来的

textEn: Oh, so there's gonna be a fifth date?
textZh: 噢 所以会有第五次约会啰？

textEn: Isn't there?
textZh: 会有吗？

textEn: Yeah, yeah. I think there is.
textZh: 我觉得会有

textEn: What were you gonna say?
textZh: 你要说什么？

textEn: Well... Er, uh...
textZh: 好吧

textEn: Ever since she left me, um...
textZh: 自从她离开我之后…

textEn: ...I haven't been able to perform...
textZh: 我就一直…

textEn: ...sexually.
textZh: 无法行房

textEn: Oh, God! Oh, God! I am so...
textZh: 天啊 对不起

textEn: - I'm so sorry.     - It's okay.
textZh: - 对不起…   - 没关系

textEn: Being spit on is probably not what you need right now.
textZh: 被人吐水应该不是你现在需要的

textEn: How long?
textZh: 多久了？

textEn: Two years.
textZh: 两年

textEn: I'm glad you smashed her watch.
textZh: 我真高兴你砸了她的手表

textEn: So you still think you might want that fifth date?
textZh: 那你还希望有第五次约会吗？

textEn: Yeah.
textZh: 是的

textEn: Yeah, I do.
textZh: 是的 我希望

textEn: I, Joanie, take you, Charles, as my lawful husband.
textZh: 我乔安妮 接受查理斯为我的合法丈夫

textEn: - Do you take Joanie...?     - Oh! See.
textZh: - 你是否接受乔安妮…   - 看吧

textEn: But Joanie loved Chachi. That's the difference.
textZh: 可是乔安妮爱佳奇 就是这里不同

textEn: "Grab a spoon."
textZh: "拿起汤匙"

textEn: Do you know long it's been since I grabbed a spoon?
textZh: 你知道我多久没拿汤匙了吗？

textEn: Do the words, "Billy, don't be a hero," mean anything to you?
textZh: "比利 别逞英雄" 这句话对你有没有意义？

textEn: You know, here's the thing. Even if I could get it together enough...
textZh: 是这样的 就算我想…

textEn: ...to ask a woman out...
textZh: 约一个女人出来

textEn: ...who am I gonna ask?
textZh: 我该约谁？

textEn: Isn't this amazing?
textZh: 是不是很不可思议？

textEn: I mean, I have never made coffee before in my life.
textZh: 我以前从来没泡过咖啡

textEn: - That is amazing.     - Congratulations.
textZh: - 是很不可思议   - 恭喜你

textEn: While you're on a roll, if you feel like you gotta make a Western omelet or something...
textZh: 你现在刚好有心情 有没有想做个蛋饼之类的东西…

textEn: Although, actually I'm really not that hungry this morning.
textZh: 不过我还不太饿…

textEn: - Good morning.     - Good morning.
textZh: - 早安   - 早安

textEn: - Morning.     - Morning.
textZh: - 早安   - 早安

textEn: - Morning.     - Morning, Paul.
textZh: - 早安   - 早安 保罗

textEn: - Hello, Paul.     - Hi. Paul, is it?
textZh: - 你好 保罗   - 嘿 是保罗 对吗？

textEn: I had a really great time last night.
textZh: 我昨晚很开心

textEn: Thank you. Thank you so much.
textZh: 谢谢你 太感谢你了

textEn: - We'll talk later, okay?     - Yeah.
textZh: - 再聊   - 好的

textEn: Thank you.
textZh: 谢谢

textEn: That wasn't a real date.
textZh: 那不是真正的约会

textEn: What the hell do you do on a real date?
textZh: 那你真正的约会都在干什么？

textEn: - Shut up and put my table back.     - Okay.
textZh: - 闭嘴 把我的桌子搬回去   - 好的

textEn: All right, kids, I gotta get to work.
textZh: 好啦 孩子们 我要去工作啦

textEn: If I don't input those numbers, it doesn't make much of a difference.
textZh: 不过如果我不把那些数字输入 也不会有什么差别

textEn: So, like, you guys all have jobs?
textZh: 你们都有工作吗？

textEn: Yeah, we all have jobs.
textZh: 对 我们都有

textEn: See, that's how we buy stuff.
textZh: 这样我们才有钱买东西

textEn: Yeah, I'm an actor.
textZh: 对 我是演员

textEn: Wow. Would I have seen you in anything?
textZh: 我有见过你的作品吗？

textEn: Oh, I doubt it. Mostly regional work.
textZh: 应该没有 大部分是地方性节目

textEn: Unless you happened to catch the Wee One's production of Pinocchio.
textZh: 等等 除非你看过翻拍的《木偶奇遇记》

textEn: "Look, Geppeto. I'm a real live boy."
textZh: "瞧 老木匠 我是个真正的小男孩"

textEn: I will not take this abuse.
textZh: 别这样羞辱我

textEn: You're right. I'm sorry.
textZh: 没错 对不起

textEn: Once I was a wooden boy A little wooden boy
textZh: 我曾经是个小木偶…

textEn: So how are you doing today? Did you sleep okay?
textZh: 你今天怎么样？睡得好吗？

textEn: Did you talk to Barry? I can't stop smiling.
textZh: 和巴端谈过吗？我无法停止微笑

textEn: I can see that. You look like you slept with a hanger in your mouth.
textZh: 看得出来 就好像你睡觉时 有个衣架在你嘴里

textEn: I know. He's just so...
textZh: 我知道 他只是太…

textEn: Remember you and Tony De Marco?
textZh: 你还记得你和托尼多马哥吗？

textEn: - Oh, yeah.     - Well, it's like that. With feelings.
textZh: - 是的 记得   - 就好像那样 但有感觉

textEn: Oh, wow, are you in trouble!
textZh: 哇 你有麻烦了

textEn: Okay, okay. I am just going to get up, go to work...
textZh: 好 我要醒过来 去工作

textEn: ...and not think about him all day.
textZh: 而且不要整天想着他

textEn: Or else I'm just gonna get up and go to work.
textZh: 或者只是站起来去工作

textEn: - Oh, wish me luck!     - What for?
textZh: - 喔 祝我好运    - 为什么？

textEn: I'm gonna go get one of those job things.
textZh: 我要去找工作之类的事

textEn: - Hey, Monica.     - Hey, Franny. Welcome back.
textZh: - 嘿 摩妮卡   - 嘿 弗兰妮 欢迎回来

textEn: How was Florida?
textZh: 佛罗里达怎么样？

textEn: You had sex, didn't you?
textZh: 你跟人上床了 对吧？

textEn: How do you do that?
textZh: 你怎么知道的？

textEn: - So, who?     - You know Paul?
textZh: - 那么 是和谁？- 你认识保罗吗？

textEn: Paul, the wine guy?
textZh: 保罗 红酒达人？

textEn: Oh, yeah, I know Paul.
textZh: 是的 我认识保罗

textEn: You mean, you know Paul like I know Paul?
textZh: 你认识他就好像我认识他一样？

textEn: Are you kidding? I take credit for Paul.
textZh: 你开玩笑吧？保罗还欠我人情呢

textEn: Before me, there was no snap in his turtle for two years.
textZh: 在我之前 他两年都无法行房

textEn: Of course it was a lie.
textZh: 那当然是谎言

textEn: Why? Why would anybody do something like that?
textZh: 为什么？为什么有人会做这样的事情？

textEn: We're looking for an answer more sophisticated than:
textZh: 我想更精确的答案是

textEn: "To get you into bed."
textZh: "为了和你上床"

textEn: Is it me?
textZh: 是因为我吗？

textEn: Is it like I have some sort of beacon that only dogs...
textZh: 是因为我会散发某种信号吗？

textEn: ...and men with severe emotional problems can hear?
textZh: 只有狗和有感情问题的男人 才会感应到？

textEn: All right, come here. Give me your feet.
textZh: 好啦 过来这里 把你的脚给我

textEn: I just thought he was nice, you know?
textZh: 我只是以为他是个好人

textEn: I can't believe you didn't know it was a lie.
textZh: 我真不敢相信 你不知道那是谎言

textEn: Guess what.
textZh: 猜猜怎么样？

textEn: - You got a job?     - Are you kidding?
textZh: - 你找到工作啦？- 开玩笑吗？

textEn: I'm trained for nothing.
textZh: 我一点经验都没有

textEn: I was laughed out of 12 interviews today.
textZh: 我今天被十二个面试员嘲笑

textEn: Yet you're surprisingly upbeat.
textZh: 而且你还这么高兴

textEn: Well, you would be too if you found Joan and David boots on sale...
textZh: 你也会高兴的 如果你发现名牌皮靴特价…

textEn: ...50 percent off.
textZh: 打五折

textEn: Oh, how well you know me.
textZh: 是呀 你真了解我…

textEn: They're my new "I don't need a job or my parents.
textZh: 这双是 "我不需要工作 我不需要父母

textEn: I've got great boots" boots.
textZh: 我买了新皮靴"的皮靴

textEn: - How'd you pay for them?     - Uh, credit card.
textZh: - 你用什么付帐的？- 信用卡

textEn: And who pays for that?
textZh: 那谁付帐单呢？

textEn: Um, my father.
textZh: 我爸爸

textEn: You can't live off your parents your whole life.
textZh: 你不能靠你爸爸过一辈子

textEn: I know that. That's why I was getting married.
textZh: 我知道 这就是为什么我要结婚

textEn: Give her a break. It's hard being on your own for the first time.
textZh: 别逼她 第一次独立生活是很困难的

textEn: - Thank you.     - You're welcome.
textZh: - 谢谢你   - 别客气

textEn: I remember when I first came to this city, I was 14.
textZh: 记得我第一次来这个城市 我才十四岁

textEn: My mom had killed herself and my stepdad was back in prison.
textZh: 我妈妈刚自杀 我的继父又进了监狱

textEn: And I got here, and I didn't know anybody.
textZh: 然后在这里我不认识任何人

textEn: I ended up living with this albino guy who was cleaning windshields...
textZh: 然后我和一个在港务局给人擦车窗的…

textEn: ...outside Port Authority. And then he killed himself.
textZh: 白化病人住在一起 最后他也自杀了

textEn: And then I found aromatherapy. So believe me, I know exactly how you feel.
textZh: 然后我找到按摩这份工作 所以相信我 我完全了解你的威受

textEn: The word you're looking for is:
textZh: 你想说的话是:

textEn: "Anyway..."
textZh: "总之…"

textEn: All right. You ready?
textZh: 好了 准备好了吗？

textEn: - I don't think so.     - Oh, come on.
textZh: - 还没有   - 来吧

textEn: Cut. Cut.
textZh: 剪掉 剪掉

textEn: Cut, cut, cut.
textZh: 剪掉 剪掉 剪掉

textEn: - Hey.     - All right.
textZh: - 嘿   - 好耶

textEn: Welcome to the real world.
textZh: 欢迎来到真实世界

textEn: It sucks. You're gonna love it.
textZh: 它很糟糕 但是你会喜欢的

textEn: Well, that's it. You gonna crash on the couch?
textZh: 好啦 够啦 你要在沙发上睡？

textEn: - No. No, I gotta go home sometime.     - Are you gonna be okay?
textZh: - 不 我总要回家啊   - 你还好吗？

textEn: Yeah.
textZh: 是的

textEn: Look what I just found on the floor.
textZh: 看我刚才在地板上发现了什么

textEn: What?
textZh: 什么？

textEn: That's Paul's watch.
textZh: 那是保罗的手表

textEn: You can just put it back where you found it.
textZh: 你就把它放回原处吧

textEn: Oh, boy. All right. Good night, everybody.
textZh: 好吧 晚安 各位

textEn: Good night.
textZh: 晚安

textEn: - Oh, sorry.     - No. Oh, no. Go.
textZh: - 哦 抱歉   - 不 你来

textEn: - No, have it, really.     - Split it?
textZh: - 不 你吃吧   - 平分？

textEn: - Okay.     - Okay.
textZh: - 好吧   - 好吧

textEn: Thanks.
textZh: 谢谢

textEn: You probably didn't know this, but back in high school I had...
textZh: 你可能不知道 在高中…

textEn: ...a major crush on you.
textZh: 我曾暗恋过你

textEn: I knew.
textZh: 我知道

textEn: You did? Oh.
textZh: 你知道？

textEn: I figured you thought I was Monica's geeky older brother.
textZh: 我还以为你一直认为 我是摩妮卡的书呆子哥哥呢

textEn: I did.
textZh: 我是这么认为的

textEn: Listen, do you think...
textZh: 听着 你是不是认为…

textEn: And try not to let my vulnerability become any kind of a factor here.
textZh: 你不要太在意我的脆弱 这已经成为习惯

textEn: Do you think it would be okay if I ask you out sometime, maybe?
textZh: 但是你认为我可以约你出去吗？

textEn: Yeah.
textZh: 可以啊

textEn: Maybe.
textZh: 也许

textEn: Okay.
textZh: 好

textEn: Okay, maybe I will.
textZh: 好吧 我可能会约你

textEn: - Good night.     - Good night.
textZh: - 晚安   - 晚安

textEn: See you.
textZh: 再见

textEn: Wait, wait. Hey, what's with you?
textZh: 等等 你怎么啦？

textEn: I just grabbed a spoon.
textZh: 我刚刚拿起汤匙

textEn: Can't believe what I'm hearing.
textZh: 我真不敢相信我听到的

textEn: I can't believe What I'm hearing here
textZh: 我真不敢相信我听到的

textEn: - What? I said you had...     - What? I said you had...
textZh: - 怎么啦 我说你有个   - 我说你有个…

textEn: - Would you stop?     - Oh, was I doing it again?
textZh: - 有完没完？ - 我的老毛病又犯了？

textEn: Yes.
textZh: 没错

textEn: Would anybody like more coffee?
textZh: 有人要咖啡吗？

textEn: Did you make it or are you just serving it?
textZh: 你泡的 还是你只是端过来？

textEn: - I'm just serving it.     - I'll have a cup of coffee.
textZh: - 只是端过来   - 好吧 我要杯咖啡

textEn: Kids, new dream.
textZh: 孩子们 新的梦

textEn: I'm in Las Vegas. I'm Liza Minnelli.
textZh: 我在拉斯维加斯 我是丽莎.明妮莉…
